name: The Minus-Three Runoff Elemental
text:
The Minus-Three Runoff Elemental enters with negative three sludge counters on it. (Yes. It owes the reservoir three. It is in counter debt.)
It gets +2/+2 for each sludge counter on it, which currently makes it smaller than nothing, so it's a -6/-6, which means it's already dead, so it never actually enters. Feed it first. Somehow. Good luck.
flavorText: It dissolved before it finished forming, owing money it never borrowed.
